title: Schema Deduplication
purpose: Eliminate duplicate milestone/ticket schemas between meta/schemas/ and project-management/schemas/. Migrate checkpoint schema divergence. Establish single canonical schema per concept.
architectural_constraints: project-management/schemas/ owns milestone and ticket schemas
No concept may have two canonical schemas
Schema changes require version bump + compatibility check

deliverables.description: Reconciled checkpoint schema (merged with inline protocol)

acceptance_criteria: meta/schemas/milestone.schema.json and meta/schemas/ticket.schema.json deprecated or removed
project-management/schemas/ schemas validate all existing data
Checkpoint schema divergence resolved (inline vs standalone)
npm run pm:validate passes with 0 errors
No schema references broken in scripts or protocols
Schema registry updated with correct canonical paths

traceability.description: Eliminated duplicate schemas: removed meta/schemas/milestone.schema.json and ticket.schema.json. Merged checkpoint.schema.json and governance-state.schema.json into meta/governance/schemas/.

failure_modes.scenario: Deprecating meta/schemas/ breaks scripts that import from there
failure_modes.mitigation: Update all imports before deletion; use registry loader
